overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval fortified town during a golden hour sunset. The character traverses a stone bridge, passes through a fortified gatehouse, and navigates narrow cobblestone streets lined with historic stone and timber buildings.

events.description: passes a guard standing with halberd on the left side of the bridge
path curves right revealing wooden railing and view of water below

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily across the stone bridge toward the castle, swords visible on back

notable_agents.action: guard standing at attention holding a halberd

entered.detail: tall stone wall with rough texture running along the right side of the bridge
wooden fence railing along the left side overlooking the water
large fortified castle with multiple towers silhouetted against the sunset
cylindrical stone tower with conical roof visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks across a medieval stone bridge during golden hour, with a high stone wall on the right and wooden railings on the left. The castle keep is visible ahead against the orange sunset sky. A guard stands at attention as the character passes.

events.description: passes first burning brazier casting warm orange light on the cobblestones
approaching the large wooden gatehouse archway entrance to the inner town

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the town square toward the gatehouse, passing between burning braziers

entered.detail: wooden post fence running along the right side of the path
large fortified gatehouse with wooden doors and stone archway
metal fire baskets burning with orange flames lining the approach
medieval stone houses with dark roofs on the left side

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a town square with burning braziers illuminating the cobblestone path. The camera approaches a large fortified gatehouse ahead, with wooden fencing on the right and stone buildings on the left. The round tower shifts to the left as the path curves toward the gate.

events.description: passing through the gatehouse archway into the inner walled town
passes a guard holding a torch on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking through the gatehouse arch into the narrower streets of the inner town

notable_agents.action: guard standing with torch illuminating the stone wall

entered.detail: tall thick stone walls of the fortress rising on the right side
wall-mounted torch burning in a metal bracket

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes through the gatehouse archway into a narrower passage with high stone fortress walls on the right. The lighting becomes slightly darker under the arch, and a guard with a torch stands watch on the right. The wooden fencing and gatehouse structure fall behind as the character enters the inner town.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow medieval street with timber buildings

events.description: passing timber-framed buildings on the right as the street narrows

agents.ego_description: continuing down the narrow cobblestone street between stone and timber buildings

entered.detail: medieval half-timbered building with dark wooden beams and plaster walls
small stone building with arched doorway on the left

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow cobblestone street lined with timber-framed houses on the right and stone cottages on the left. The high fortress wall recedes behind as the path winds through the medieval residential area, with the warm sunset light casting long shadows across the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open stone bridge into the dense, shadowed residential quarters of a medieval fortified town during a golden sunset. It begins with Geralt crossing a bridge flanked by a high stone wall and wooden railings, moving toward a distant castle keep under an orange sky. As the path opens into a town square, the camera glides past burning braziers and a round tower before curving toward a massive fortified gatehouse. The scene then shifts as the character passes through the dark archway of the gate, leaving the outer fortifications behind while passing a torch-bearing guard. Finally, the view expands into a narrow cobblestone street lined with timber-framed houses and stone cottages, where the warm sunset light casts long shadows across the winding residential path.
